All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

L

label() - Method in record class client.app.Navigator.Screen
Returns the value of the label record component.
leaveWaitlist(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Leaves the waiting list for a WAITING reservation.
listAll() - Method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Lists every park, alphabetically by name — used to populate the booking park dropdown.
listForUser(int) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Lists every notification addressed to a staff user, newest first.
listForVisitor(long) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Lists every notification addressed to a visitor, newest first.
listNotifications() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists the logged-in actor's notifications, newest first (the offline-fetch path for the notification center).
listParks() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists every park, for the booking dropdown.
listPending() - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Lists every request still awaiting a decision, oldest first.
listPendingChanges() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists all PENDING parameter-change requests (DEPT_MANAGER only).
listReservations(long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists every reservation owned by a visitor.
listWaitlist(long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries (queue position + any live grab offer).
load() - Static method in class server.db.DotEnv
 
loadInto(BiConsumer<String, String>) - Static method in class server.db.DotEnv
 
lock(long, String) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Acquires the single-login lock for an actor by inserting a row into active_session.
login(ClientConnection, String, int) - Method in class client.app.Session
Promotes a freshly probed connection into the session (connection screen).
loginStaff(String, String) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Authenticates a staff user.
loginVisitor(long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Authenticates a visitor by national ID.
logout() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Logs the current actor out, releasing the server-side single-login lock.
